title: Comprehensive Room Inspection Protocol for Hotels in Egypt
trigger: Scheduled room inspection following guest checkout or prior to guest check-in.

steps.title: Preparation for Inspection
steps.action: Gather necessary tools such as inspection checklist, camera for documentation, and cleaning supplies. Ensure the room is vacant and the 'Do Not Disturb' sign is not displayed.

steps.title: Initial Room Assessment
steps.action: Enter the room and conduct an initial assessment. Check for any visible damages, cleanliness, and ensure all amenities are present.

steps.title: Report and Document Damages
steps.action: Document any damages using the camera and update the inspection checklist. Report the damages to the maintenance department for immediate action.

steps.title: Detailed Inspection
steps.action: Inspect all room elements including bedding, bathroom, electronics, and F&B items. Ensure everything is in working order and meets brand standards.

steps.title: Final Approval
steps.action: Review the completed checklist and ensure all issues have been addressed. Approve the room for guest occupancy.

description: This playbook outlines the step-by-step process for conducting room inspections in hotels, ensuring operational excellence and adherence to brand standards in Egypt.
escalation_path: Report to Operations Manager if room fails inspection twice consecutively.
